title: Smugglers of the Outer Rim
content:

"'''Smugglers of the Outer Rim'''" is an article by [[Doug Shuler]] which introduces the characters [[Jin-Jin]], [[Bora Boru]], [[Jericho Donovan]], [[Josephine Donovan]] and [[SCr-114]] as well as their respective [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. Also of note, it introduces many aspects of the [[Bosph (species)|Bosph]] culture. The article was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]].

*<!-- 1995-02-XX -->[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]]
